name: GreenSpace Brands Inc.
summary: GreenSpace Brands Inc. develops, markets, and sells organic and natural food products to consumers in Canada and the United States. The company provides snack food products, such as raw and roasted nuts, seeds, and dried fruits under the Central Roast brand; and cheese-free products under the GO VEGGIE brand name. It also offers food products for infants, toddlers, and small children under the Love Child Organics brand name. GreenSpace Brands Inc. is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
